```{r}
p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = variable, y = Bayes.factor, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", Bayes.factor)), vjust = -0.5, size = 5) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  color_scale +
  labs(title = "Bayes Factor Variation with Different Covariates", 
       x = "Covariate", y = "Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(floor(min(data$Bayes.factor)), ceiling(max(data$Bayes.factor)), by = 0.25))

ggsave("dry_Bayes_Factor_Variation.png", plot = p, width = 10, height = 7.5, dpi = 300)

print("Bayes factor variation plot saved as 'Bayes_Factor_Variation.png'")







############################ Normal ###########################################

check.DJF.wet <- 0.4912692
check.DJF.dry <- -0.4912692

model <- bn.fit(dag,data.Q)
joint = gbn2mvnorm(model)




mutEP = mutilated(model, evidence=list(EP = 0)) # placeholder value, will be replaced in the next command
# Parameters of truncated distribution
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["EP"],joint$sigma["EP", "EP"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["EP"],joint$sigma["EP", "EP"],-1,-Inf)

mutEP$EP = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutEP,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (EP>0))
}
mutEP$EP = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutEP,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (EP<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat1 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat1 <- rbind(stat1,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Eastern Precipitation'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

# Generate the box plot using ggplot2
Plot1 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for Eastern Precipitation") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


mutN12 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N12 = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N12"],joint$sigma["N12", "N12"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N12"],joint$sigma["N12", "N12"],-1,-Inf)


mutN12$N12 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN12,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (N12>0))
}
mutN12$N12 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN12,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (N12<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat2 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat2 <- rbind(stat2,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Nino12'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot2 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO12") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



mutN3 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N3 = 0)) # placeholder value, will be replaced in the next command
# parameters of truncated distribution
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N3"],joint$sigma["N3", "N3"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N3"],joint$sigma["N3", "N3"],-1,-Inf)

mutN3$N3 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN3,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (N3>0))
}
mutN3$N3 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN3,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (N3<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat3 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat3 <- rbind(stat3,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'NinO3'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot3 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO3") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



mutN4 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N4 = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N4"],joint$sigma["N4", "N4"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N4"],joint$sigma["N4", "N4"],-1,-Inf)

mutN4$N4 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN4,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (N4>0))
}
mutN4$N4 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN4,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (N4<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat4 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat4 <- rbind(stat4,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'NinO4'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot4 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO4") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



mutWP = mutilated(model, evidence=list(WP = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["WP"],joint$sigma["WP", "WP"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["WP"],joint$sigma["WP", "WP"],-1,-Inf)

mutWP$WP = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutWP,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (WP>0))
}
mutWP$WP = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutWP,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (WP<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat5 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat5 <- rbind(stat1,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Western Precipitation'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot5 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for MJO") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))





mutMJO = mutilated(model, evidence=list(MJO = 0)) # placeholder value, will be replaced in the next command
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["MJO"],joint$sigma["MJO", "MJO"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["MJO"],joint$sigma["MJO", "MJO"],-1,-Inf)

mutMJO$MJO = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutMJO,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (MJO>0))
}
mutMJO$MJO = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutMJO,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (MJO<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat6 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat6 <- rbind(stat6,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'MJO'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot6 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for MJO") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


mutDMI = mutilated(model, evidence=list(DMI = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["DMI"],joint$sigma["DMI", "DMI"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["DMI"],joint$sigma["DMI", "DMI"],-1,-Inf)

mutDMI$DMI = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutDMI,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (DMI>0))
}
mutDMI$DMI = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutDMI,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (DMI<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat7 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat7 <- rbind(stat7,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'DMI'))


library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot7 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for DMI") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


combined_stat <- rbind(stat1, stat2, stat3, stat4, stat5, stat6, stat7)

write.csv(combined_stat, "wet_Model1_Merged_Bayes_Factor.csv", row.names = FALSE)

print("Merged data has been successfully written to 'Merged_Bayes_Factor_Results.csv'")

library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

plot_list <- lapply(list(Plot1, Plot2, Plot3, Plot4,Plot5, Plot6, Plot7), function(p) {
  grid.grabExpr(print(p))
})

png("Normal_Bayes_factor_Box_plot.png", width = 1200, height = 1200, res = 150)
grid.arrange(grobs = plot_list, ncol = 3, nrow = 3)
dev.off()


library(ggplot2)

data <- read.csv("wet_Model1_Merged_Bayes_Factor.csv")

color_scale <- scale_fill_gradient(low = "skyblue", high = "darkblue")

p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = variable, y = Bayes.factor, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", Bayes.factor)), vjust = -0.5, size = 5) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  color_scale +
  labs(title = "Bayes Factor Variation with Different Covariates", 
       x = "Covariate", y = "Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(floor(min(data$Bayes.factor)), ceiling(max(data$Bayes.factor)), by = 0.25))

ggsave("Normal_Bayes_Factor_Variation.png", plot = p, width = 10, height = 7.5, dpi = 300)

print("Bayes factor variation plot saved as 'Bayes_Factor_Variation.png'")


```




###################**late**################################
```{r}
setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Indi_Causality_Data/Late//")
data.Q = read.csv('NQ_Causality_Combined_data.csv')


check.DJF = 0.4912692	

model <- bn.fit(dag,data.Q)
joint = gbn2mvnorm(model)




mutEP = mutilated(model, evidence=list(EP = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["EP"],joint$sigma["EP", "EP"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["EP"],joint$sigma["EP", "EP"],-1,-Inf)

mutEP$EP = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutEP,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (EP>0))
}
mutEP$EP = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutEP,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (EP<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat1 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat1 <- rbind(stat1,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Eastern Precipitation'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot1 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for Eastern Precipitation") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


mutN12 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N12 = 0))
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N12"],joint$sigma["N12", "N12"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N12"],joint$sigma["N12", "N12"],-1,-Inf)

mutN12$N12 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN12,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (N12>0))
}
mutN12$N12 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN12,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (N12<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat2 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat2 <- rbind(stat2,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Nino12'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot2 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO12") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



mutN3 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N3 = 0))
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N3"],joint$sigma["N3", "N3"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N3"],joint$sigma["N3", "N3"],-1,-Inf)

mutN3$N3 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN3,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (N3>0))
}
mutN3$N3 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN3,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (N3<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat3 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat3 <- rbind(stat3,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'NinO3'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot3 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO3") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



##Nino4
mutN4 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N4 = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N4"],joint$sigma["N4", "N4"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N4"],joint$sigma["N4", "N4"],-1,-Inf)

mutN4$N4 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN4,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (N4>0))
}
mutN4$N4 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN4,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (N4<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat4 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat4 <- rbind(stat4,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'NinO4'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot4 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO4") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



mutWP = mutilated(model, evidence=list(WP = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["WP"],joint$sigma["WP", "WP"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["WP"],joint$sigma["WP", "WP"],-1,-Inf)

mutWP$WP = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutWP,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (WP>0))
}
mutWP$WP = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutWP,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (WP<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat5 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat5 <- rbind(stat1,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Western Precipitation'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot5 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for MJO") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))




##MJO

mutMJO = mutilated(model, evidence=list(MJO = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["MJO"],joint$sigma["MJO", "MJO"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["MJO"],joint$sigma["MJO", "MJO"],-1,-Inf)

mutMJO$MJO = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutMJO,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (MJO>0))
}
mutMJO$MJO = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutMJO,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (MJO<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat6 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat6 <- rbind(stat6,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'MJO'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot6 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for MJO") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


mutDMI = mutilated(model, evidence=list(DMI = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["DMI"],joint$sigma["DMI", "DMI"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["DMI"],joint$sigma["DMI", "DMI"],-1,-Inf)

mutDMI$DMI = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutDMI,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (DMI>0))
}
mutDMI$DMI = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutDMI,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (DMI<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat7 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat7 <- rbind(stat7,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'DMI'))


library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot7 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for DMI") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


combined_stat <- rbind(stat1, stat2, stat3, stat4, stat5, stat6, stat7)

write.csv(combined_stat, "wet_Model1_Merged_Bayes_Factor.csv", row.names = FALSE)

print("Merged data has been successfully written to 'Merged_Bayes_Factor_Results.csv'")

library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

plot_list <- lapply(list(Plot1, Plot2, Plot3, Plot4,Plot5, Plot6, Plot7), function(p) {
  grid.grabExpr(print(p))
})

png("Wet_Bayes_factor_Box_plot.png", width = 1200, height = 1200, res = 150)
grid.arrange(grobs = plot_list, ncol = 3, nrow = 3)
dev.off()


library(ggplot2)

data <- read.csv("wet_Model1_Merged_Bayes_Factor.csv")


color_scale <- scale_fill_gradient(low = "skyblue", high = "darkblue")

p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = variable, y = Bayes.factor, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", Bayes.factor)), vjust = -0.5, size = 5) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  color_scale +
  labs(title = "Bayes Factor Variation with Different Covariates", 
       x = "Covariate", y = "Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(floor(min(data$Bayes.factor)), ceiling(max(data$Bayes.factor)), by = 0.25))

ggsave("wet_Bayes_Factor_Variation.png", plot = p, width = 10, height = 7.5, dpi = 300)

print("Bayes factor variation plot saved as 'Bayes_Factor_Variation.png'")







############################ dRY ###########################################




check.DJF = -0.4912692	

model <- bn.fit(dag,data.Q)
joint = gbn2mvnorm(model)




mutEP = mutilated(model, evidence=list(EP = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["EP"],joint$sigma["EP", "EP"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["EP"],joint$sigma["EP", "EP"],-1,-Inf)

mutEP$EP = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutEP,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (EP>0))
}
mutEP$EP = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutEP,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (EP<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat1 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat1 <- rbind(stat1,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Eastern Precipitation'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot1 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for Eastern Precipitation") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


##Nino12
mutN12 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N12 = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N12"],joint$sigma["N12", "N12"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N12"],joint$sigma["N12", "N12"],-1,-Inf)

# lower tail truncation
mutN12$N12 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN12,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (N12>0))
}
mutN12$N12 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN12,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (N12<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat2 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat2 <- rbind(stat2,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Nino12'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot2 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO12") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


##Nino3

mutN3 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N3 = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N3"],joint$sigma["N3", "N3"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N3"],joint$sigma["N3", "N3"],-1,-Inf)

mutN3$N3 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN3,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (N3>0))
}
mutN3$N3 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN3,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (N3<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat3 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat3 <- rbind(stat3,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'NinO3'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot3 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO3") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



##Nino4
mutN4 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N4 = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N4"],joint$sigma["N4", "N4"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N4"],joint$sigma["N4", "N4"],-1,-Inf)

mutN4$N4 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN4,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (N4>0))
}
mutN4$N4 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN4,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (N4<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat4 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat4 <- rbind(stat4,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'NinO4'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot4 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO4") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



mutWP = mutilated(model, evidence=list(WP = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["WP"],joint$sigma["WP", "WP"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["WP"],joint$sigma["WP", "WP"],-1,-Inf)

mutWP$WP = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutWP,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (WP>0))
}
mutWP$WP = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutWP,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (WP<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat5 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat5 <- rbind(stat1,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Western Precipitation'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot5 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for MJO") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))




##MJO

mutMJO = mutilated(model, evidence=list(MJO = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["MJO"],joint$sigma["MJO", "MJO"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["MJO"],joint$sigma["MJO", "MJO"],-1,-Inf)

mutMJO$MJO = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutMJO,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (MJO>0))
}
mutMJO$MJO = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutMJO,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (MJO<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat6 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat6 <- rbind(stat6,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'MJO'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot6 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for MJO") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


mutDMI = mutilated(model, evidence=list(DMI = 0)) 
# parameters of truncated distribution
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["DMI"],joint$sigma["DMI", "DMI"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["DMI"],joint$sigma["DMI", "DMI"],-1,-Inf)

mutDMI$DMI = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutDMI,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (DMI>0))
}
mutDMI$DMI = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutDMI,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (DMI<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat7 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat7 <- rbind(stat7,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'DMI'))


library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot7 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for DMI") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


combined_stat <- rbind(stat1, stat2, stat3, stat4, stat5, stat6, stat7)

# Write the merged data frame to a CSV file
write.csv(combined_stat, "wet_Model1_Merged_Bayes_Factor.csv", row.names = FALSE)

print("Merged data has been successfully written to 'Merged_Bayes_Factor_Results.csv'")

library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

plot_list <- lapply(list(Plot1, Plot2, Plot3, Plot4,Plot5, Plot6, Plot7), function(p) {
  grid.grabExpr(print(p))
})

png("Dry_Bayes_factor_Box_plot.png", width = 1200, height = 1200, res = 150)
grid.arrange(grobs = plot_list, ncol = 3, nrow = 3)
dev.off()


library(ggplot2)

data <- read.csv("wet_Model1_Merged_Bayes_Factor.csv")

color_scale <- scale_fill_gradient(low = "skyblue", high = "darkblue")

p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = variable, y = Bayes.factor, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", Bayes.factor)), vjust = -0.5, size = 5) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  color_scale +
  labs(title = "Bayes Factor Variation with Different Covariates", 
       x = "Covariate", y = "Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(floor(min(data$Bayes.factor)), ceiling(max(data$Bayes.factor)), by = 0.25))

ggsave("dry_Bayes_Factor_Variation.png", plot = p, width = 10, height = 7.5, dpi = 300)

print("Bayes factor variation plot saved as 'Bayes_Factor_Variation.png'")







############################ Normal ###########################################

check.DJF.wet <- 0.4912692
check.DJF.dry <- -0.4912692

model <- bn.fit(dag,data.Q)
joint = gbn2mvnorm(model)




mutEP = mutilated(model, evidence=list(EP = 0)) # placeholder value, will be replaced in the next command
# Parameters of truncated distribution
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["EP"],joint$sigma["EP", "EP"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["EP"],joint$sigma["EP", "EP"],-1,-Inf)

mutEP$EP = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutEP,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (EP>0))
}
mutEP$EP = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutEP,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (EP<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat1 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat1 <- rbind(stat1,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Eastern Precipitation'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

# Generate the box plot using ggplot2
Plot1 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for Eastern Precipitation") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


mutN12 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N12 = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N12"],joint$sigma["N12", "N12"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N12"],joint$sigma["N12", "N12"],-1,-Inf)


mutN12$N12 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN12,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (N12>0))
}
mutN12$N12 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN12,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (N12<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat2 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat2 <- rbind(stat2,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Nino12'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot2 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO12") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



mutN3 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N3 = 0)) # placeholder value, will be replaced in the next command
# parameters of truncated distribution
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N3"],joint$sigma["N3", "N3"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N3"],joint$sigma["N3", "N3"],-1,-Inf)

mutN3$N3 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN3,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (N3>0))
}
mutN3$N3 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN3,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (N3<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat3 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat3 <- rbind(stat3,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'NinO3'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot3 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO3") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



mutN4 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N4 = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N4"],joint$sigma["N4", "N4"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N4"],joint$sigma["N4", "N4"],-1,-Inf)

mutN4$N4 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN4,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (N4>0))
}
mutN4$N4 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN4,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (N4<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat4 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat4 <- rbind(stat4,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'NinO4'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot4 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO4") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



mutWP = mutilated(model, evidence=list(WP = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["WP"],joint$sigma["WP", "WP"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["WP"],joint$sigma["WP", "WP"],-1,-Inf)

mutWP$WP = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutWP,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (WP>0))
}
mutWP$WP = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutWP,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (WP<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat5 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat5 <- rbind(stat1,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Western Precipitation'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot5 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for MJO") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))





mutMJO = mutilated(model, evidence=list(MJO = 0)) # placeholder value, will be replaced in the next command
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["MJO"],joint$sigma["MJO", "MJO"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["MJO"],joint$sigma["MJO", "MJO"],-1,-Inf)

mutMJO$MJO = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutMJO,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (MJO>0))
}
mutMJO$MJO = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutMJO,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (MJO<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat6 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat6 <- rbind(stat6,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'MJO'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot6 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for MJO") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


mutDMI = mutilated(model, evidence=list(DMI = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["DMI"],joint$sigma["DMI", "DMI"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["DMI"],joint$sigma["DMI", "DMI"],-1,-Inf)

mutDMI$DMI = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutDMI,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (DMI>0))
}
mutDMI$DMI = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutDMI,event = (Q > check.DJF.dry & Q < check.DJF.wet),evidence = (DMI<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat7 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat7 <- rbind(stat7,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'DMI'))


library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot7 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for DMI") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


combined_stat <- rbind(stat1, stat2, stat3, stat4, stat5, stat6, stat7)

write.csv(combined_stat, "wet_Model1_Merged_Bayes_Factor.csv", row.names = FALSE)

print("Merged data has been successfully written to 'Merged_Bayes_Factor_Results.csv'")

library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

plot_list <- lapply(list(Plot1, Plot2, Plot3, Plot4,Plot5, Plot6, Plot7), function(p) {
  grid.grabExpr(print(p))
})

png("Normal_Bayes_factor_Box_plot.png", width = 1200, height = 1200, res = 150)
grid.arrange(grobs = plot_list, ncol = 3, nrow = 3)
dev.off()


library(ggplot2)

data <- read.csv("wet_Model1_Merged_Bayes_Factor.csv")

color_scale <- scale_fill_gradient(low = "skyblue", high = "darkblue")

p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = variable, y = Bayes.factor, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", Bayes.factor)), vjust = -0.5, size = 5) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  color_scale +
  labs(title = "Bayes Factor Variation with Different Covariates", 
       x = "Covariate", y = "Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(floor(min(data$Bayes.factor)), ceiling(max(data$Bayes.factor)), by = 0.25))

ggsave("Normal_Bayes_Factor_Variation.png", plot = p, width = 10, height = 7.5, dpi = 300)

print("Bayes factor variation plot saved as 'Bayes_Factor_Variation.png'")


```




###################**Monsoon**################################
```{r}
setwd("/Volumes/Naman_Exter/Tom_Stage_Data/Paper_final_data/Indi_Causality_Data/Monsoon/")
data.Q = read.csv('NQ_Causality_Combined_data.csv')


check.DJF = 0.4912692	

model <- bn.fit(dag,data.Q)
joint = gbn2mvnorm(model)




mutEP = mutilated(model, evidence=list(EP = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["EP"],joint$sigma["EP", "EP"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["EP"],joint$sigma["EP", "EP"],-1,-Inf)

mutEP$EP = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutEP,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (EP>0))
}
mutEP$EP = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutEP,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (EP<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat1 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat1 <- rbind(stat1,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Eastern Precipitation'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot1 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for Eastern Precipitation") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


mutN12 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N12 = 0))
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N12"],joint$sigma["N12", "N12"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N12"],joint$sigma["N12", "N12"],-1,-Inf)

mutN12$N12 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN12,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (N12>0))
}
mutN12$N12 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN12,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (N12<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat2 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat2 <- rbind(stat2,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Nino12'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot2 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO12") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



mutN3 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N3 = 0))
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N3"],joint$sigma["N3", "N3"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N3"],joint$sigma["N3", "N3"],-1,-Inf)

mutN3$N3 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN3,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (N3>0))
}
mutN3$N3 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN3,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (N3<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat3 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat3 <- rbind(stat3,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'NinO3'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot3 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO3") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



##Nino4
mutN4 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N4 = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N4"],joint$sigma["N4", "N4"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N4"],joint$sigma["N4", "N4"],-1,-Inf)

mutN4$N4 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN4,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (N4>0))
}
mutN4$N4 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN4,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (N4<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat4 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat4 <- rbind(stat4,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'NinO4'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot4 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO4") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



mutWP = mutilated(model, evidence=list(WP = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["WP"],joint$sigma["WP", "WP"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["WP"],joint$sigma["WP", "WP"],-1,-Inf)

mutWP$WP = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutWP,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (WP>0))
}
mutWP$WP = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutWP,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (WP<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat5 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat5 <- rbind(stat1,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Western Precipitation'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot5 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for MJO") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))




##MJO

mutMJO = mutilated(model, evidence=list(MJO = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["MJO"],joint$sigma["MJO", "MJO"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["MJO"],joint$sigma["MJO", "MJO"],-1,-Inf)

mutMJO$MJO = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutMJO,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (MJO>0))
}
mutMJO$MJO = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutMJO,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (MJO<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat6 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat6 <- rbind(stat6,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'MJO'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot6 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for MJO") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


mutDMI = mutilated(model, evidence=list(DMI = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["DMI"],joint$sigma["DMI", "DMI"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["DMI"],joint$sigma["DMI", "DMI"],-1,-Inf)

mutDMI$DMI = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutDMI,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (DMI>0))
}
mutDMI$DMI = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutDMI,event = (Q>=check.DJF),evidence = (DMI<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat7 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat7 <- rbind(stat7,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'DMI'))


library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot7 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for DMI") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


combined_stat <- rbind(stat1, stat2, stat3, stat4, stat5, stat6, stat7)

write.csv(combined_stat, "wet_Model1_Merged_Bayes_Factor.csv", row.names = FALSE)

print("Merged data has been successfully written to 'Merged_Bayes_Factor_Results.csv'")

library(gridExtra)
library(grid)

plot_list <- lapply(list(Plot1, Plot2, Plot3, Plot4,Plot5, Plot6, Plot7), function(p) {
  grid.grabExpr(print(p))
})

png("Wet_Bayes_factor_Box_plot.png", width = 1200, height = 1200, res = 150)
grid.arrange(grobs = plot_list, ncol = 3, nrow = 3)
dev.off()


library(ggplot2)

data <- read.csv("wet_Model1_Merged_Bayes_Factor.csv")


color_scale <- scale_fill_gradient(low = "skyblue", high = "darkblue")

p <- ggplot(data, aes(x = variable, y = Bayes.factor, fill = Bayes.factor)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", Bayes.factor)), vjust = -0.5, size = 5) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  color_scale +
  labs(title = "Bayes Factor Variation with Different Covariates", 
       x = "Covariate", y = "Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    legend.key = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(floor(min(data$Bayes.factor)), ceiling(max(data$Bayes.factor)), by = 0.25))

ggsave("wet_Bayes_Factor_Variation.png", plot = p, width = 10, height = 7.5, dpi = 300)

print("Bayes factor variation plot saved as 'Bayes_Factor_Variation.png'")







############################ dRY ###########################################




check.DJF = -0.4912692	

model <- bn.fit(dag,data.Q)
joint = gbn2mvnorm(model)




mutEP = mutilated(model, evidence=list(EP = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["EP"],joint$sigma["EP", "EP"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["EP"],joint$sigma["EP", "EP"],-1,-Inf)

mutEP$EP = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutEP,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (EP>0))
}
mutEP$EP = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutEP,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (EP<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat1 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat1 <- rbind(stat1,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Eastern Precipitation'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot1 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for Eastern Precipitation") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


##Nino12
mutN12 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N12 = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N12"],joint$sigma["N12", "N12"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N12"],joint$sigma["N12", "N12"],-1,-Inf)

# lower tail truncation
mutN12$N12 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN12,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (N12>0))
}
mutN12$N12 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN12,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (N12<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat2 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat2 <- rbind(stat2,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Nino12'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot2 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO12") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))


##Nino3

mutN3 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N3 = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N3"],joint$sigma["N3", "N3"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N3"],joint$sigma["N3", "N3"],-1,-Inf)

mutN3$N3 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN3,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (N3>0))
}
mutN3$N3 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN3,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (N3<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat3 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat3 <- rbind(stat3,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'NinO3'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot3 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO3") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



##Nino4
mutN4 = mutilated(model, evidence=list(N4 = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N4"],joint$sigma["N4", "N4"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["N4"],joint$sigma["N4", "N4"],-1,-Inf)

mutN4$N4 = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutN4,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (N4>0))
}
mutN4$N4 = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutN4,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (N4<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat4 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat4 <- rbind(stat4,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'NinO4'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot4 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for NINO4") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))



mutWP = mutilated(model, evidence=list(WP = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["WP"],joint$sigma["WP", "WP"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["WP"],joint$sigma["WP", "WP"],-1,-Inf)

mutWP$WP = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutWP,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (WP>0))
}
mutWP$WP = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutWP,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (WP<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat5 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat5 <- rbind(stat1,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'Western Precipitation'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot5 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for MJO") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()

percentiles <- quantile(bayes_factor_data$BayesFactor, probs = c(0.05, 0.95))
print(paste("5th percentile:", percentiles[1]))
print(paste("95th percentile:", percentiles[2]))




##MJO

mutMJO = mutilated(model, evidence=list(MJO = 0)) 
param.lower <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["MJO"],joint$sigma["MJO", "MJO"],Inf,1)
param.upper <- estimate_truncated_normal_parameters(joint$mu["MJO"],joint$sigma["MJO", "MJO"],-1,-Inf)

mutMJO$MJO = list(coef = param.lower$mean[[1]], sd = param.lower$sd[[1]])
query.high = query.low = NULL
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.high[q] <- cpquery(mutMJO,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (MJO>0))
}
mutMJO$MJO = list(coef = param.upper$mean[[1]], sd = param.upper$sd[[1]])
for (q in 1:1000){
  query.low[q] <- cpquery(mutMJO,event = (Q<=check.DJF),evidence = (MJO<0))
}
query.high[query.high==0]=0.000000000001
query.low[query.low==0]=0.000000000001
stat6 <- data.frame(num = numeric(), deno = numeric(), Bayes.factor = numeric(), 
                   flood_threshold = numeric(), season = character(), variable = character())

stat6 <- rbind(stat6,data.frame('num' = median(query.high),'deno'= median(query.low),
                              'Bayes.factor'=log10(mean(query.high)/mean(query.low)),
                              'flood_threshold'=check.DJF,'season'='JJAS Monsoon',
                              'variable'= 'MJO'))
library(ggplot2)

bayes_factor_data <- data.frame(BayesFactor = log10(query.high / query.low))

Plot6 <- ggplot(bayes_factor_data, aes(y = BayesFactor)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", color = "blue") +
  ggtitle("Bayes Factor for MJO") +
  ylab("Log10 Bayes Factor") +
  theme_minimal()
```
